commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4931411cf610ab060cc674f493188f3d4d0efcaf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram account selection so the missing-default warning is suppressed when `channels.telegram.defaultAccount` is configured, adds a regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main warns whenever the resolved account equals the first sorted account, so the reporter's valid `defaultAccount: "charles"` case reproduces without needing a new feature.
commands.review_followup: This active external PR needs contributor proof and a small code/test correction before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: fix(telegram): suppress accounts.default warning when defaultAccount is set
target.author: infracore

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
